en.extract:
Hodgson's redstart (Phoenicurus hodgsoni) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.
It is found in Bhutan, China, India, Myanmar, and Nepal.
Its natural habitat is temperate forests.
It is a winter visitor in the Himalayas.

'''Hodgson's redstart''' ('''''Phoenicurus hodgsoni''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].

It is found in [[Bhutan]], [[China]], [[India]], [[Myanmar]], and [[Nepal]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is temperate [[forest]]s.

It is a winter visitor in the Himalayas.

zh.extract:
黑喉紅尾鴝（Hodgson's Redstart，學名：Phoenicurus hodgsoni）是屬於鶲科的一種雀鳥，是紅尾鴝屬的一種。分佈於不丹、中國、印度、緬甸、尼泊爾。出沒於開闊原野和林地。雄鳥上體大致灰色。面部到胸部黑色，下體至尾部紅褐色。雌鳥翼上沒有白斑。
